hook: Depth does not require instant seriousness; it requires enough honesty for the exchange to stop skating on the surface.
body: A conversation can stay light and still become real if someone is willing to say something specific and human.

hook: Men sometimes think depth means confessing too much too early, so they avoid it entirely.
body: Depth is often just a more truthful degree of specificity.
